name: cloudrift-cdk-test
description: CDK stack that deploys intentionally wasted AWS resources to validate cloudrift detection

scripts.validate:pdf: node ${CLOUDRIFT_PATH:-../../cloudrift}/apps/cli/dist/main.js analyze --regions ${AWS_REGION:-${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-$(aws configure get region 2>/dev/null || echo us-east-1)}} --all-services --min-age-days 0 --live-pricing --pdf
scripts.validate:cli: node ${CLOUDRIFT_PATH:-../../cloudrift}/apps/cli/dist/main.js analyze --regions ${AWS_REGION:-${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-$(aws configure get region 2>/dev/null || echo us-east-1)}} --all-services --min-age-days 0 --live-pricing
scripts.test:full: npm run deploy && npm run post-deploy && echo '⏳ Waiting 5 min for CloudWatch metrics...' && sleep 300 && npm run validate
